# @efficientlabs/atmosphere

The Atmosphere — sovereign P2P compute mesh node. Joins the public Hyperswarm DHT via NAT hole-punch (no open ports) and runs ONLY post-quantum-verified skills (ML-DSA-65 + Ed25519).

## Install
```sh
npm i -g @efficientlabs/atmosphere@1.0.0
atmos-ghost --help
```

This package contains no fabricated status or metrics; commands report only what they measure.
_Assembled from the Efficient Labs private upstream — see `provenance.json` for the source commit._
